artworks.title: Cherry Blossom Dreams
artworks.description: A delicate watercolor depicting spring cherry blossoms in full bloom, capturing the ethereal beauty of nature's awakening.

artworks.title: Sunset Serenity
artworks.description: An oil painting capturing the warm glow of sunset over tranquil waters, evoking peace and contemplation.

artworks.title: Morning Mist
artworks.description: A soft watercolor portrayal of morning fog rolling through mountain valleys, creating an atmosphere of quiet mystery.
